Bulk Create

Upload a CSV to create multiple orders at once

CSV Format:
Order ID,Customer Name,Phone Number,Address,Landmark,City,Pincode,Delivery Type,Payment Status,Order Status,Product Name,Quantity,Price

One row per product. Repeat order-level fields for each product row. Orders with existing IDs will be skipped.
Click to upload or drag & drop a CSV file

Bulk Edit

Update existing orders via CSV — only non-empty fields are updated

CSV Format:
Order ID,Customer Name,Phone Number,Address,Landmark,City,Pincode,Delivery Type,Courier,AWB Number,Payment Status,Order Status

Leave any column empty to keep the existing value. Order ID is required.
Click to upload or drag & drop a CSV file

Delete Orders

Permanently remove orders from the system

⚠ Deletions are permanent and cannot be undone. Each deletion requires confirmation. Use with caution.

⚙ API Configuration

Enter the URL of your deployed Google Apps Script web app.

Setup instructions
1. Open your Google Sheet → Extensions → Apps Script
2. Paste the contents of Code.gs
3. Deploy → New deployment → Web App
4. Set access to "Anyone"
5. Copy the URL and paste above

⚠ Confirm Deletion

This action is permanent and cannot be undone.

Are you sure you want to delete this order and all its items?
